bindings.quest_action: travel to a distant camp and confirm a sighting of the missing person
bindings.quest_focus: my sister who vanished three seasons ago on a trade journey
bindings.quest_stakes: she may be alive but alone and unreachable
bindings.quest_threat: the dangerous roads and enemy territory between here and the sighting
bindings.quest_origin: a merchant's report of a woman matching her description

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I'm looking for someone. I've been looking for a very long time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} left {location} to trade {quest_item} with the settlements up north. She never arrived. Everyone says the {enemy_type} got her, but no body was found. Last week, {quest_origin} living in a camp {location_hint}. I need someone to {quest_action}. {quest_threat} keeps me from going myself.
dialogueChunks.outro: If she's alive, {quest_stakes}. She needs to know we never stopped looking.

playerResponses.text: I'll find her. If she's out there, I'll bring word.
Three seasons is a long time. Are you sure you're ready for what I might find?
Missing for that long... I don't want to be the one bringing bad news.

bindings.quest_action: follow boot prints through the wilderness to find the missing person
bindings.quest_focus: a friend who disappeared during a raid six months ago
bindings.quest_stakes: everyone else has accepted their death, but the evidence says otherwise
bindings.quest_threat: enemy territory and a trail that could go cold at any moment
bindings.quest_origin: fresh boot prints with a repair pattern I stitched myself

dialogueChunks.intro: I know what people think, {player_name}. They think I'm chasing ghosts. But I know what I saw.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} disappeared during a {enemy_type} raid on {location} six months ago. The guards held a memorial. But two weeks ago, I found {quest_origin} while gathering {quest_item} {location_hint}. {quest_stakes}. Someone is out there, and I believe it's {target_npc}. I need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus}: until I see a grave with my own eyes, I won't accept it. {quest_threat} is all that stands between us.

playerResponses.text: Boot prints are evidence. I'll follow the trail.
Hope is stubborn. I'll find out if it's justified.
Six months in the wild alone? I don't want to give you false hope.

bindings.quest_action: deliver ransom supplies to a drop point and negotiate release
bindings.quest_focus: a letter from my apprentice who vanished two years ago
bindings.quest_stakes: they're alive but held captive, begging for someone to buy their freedom
bindings.quest_threat: the captors who won't release them without payment
bindings.quest_origin: two years of guilt for sending them on the expedition where they disappeared
bindings.quest_time_pressure: the letter was urgent and every day of delay risks their safety

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need to show you something. Come inside where nobody can hear us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} arrived at {location} yesterday, left at the gate overnight. I recognize the handwriting: it's from {target_npc}, my apprentice who vanished two years ago during an expedition {location_hint}. {quest_stakes}. They need {quest_item} to trade for their freedom. I need you to {quest_action} near the old ruins. The {enemy_type} make a direct journey dangerous.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_origin}. Now there's a chance to bring them home. {quest_time_pressure}.

playerResponses.text: A letter after two years. This changes everything. I'll go.
It could be a trap using their handwriting. But I'll check it out.
A mysterious letter and dangerous territory. This screams ambush.
